movies.title: Hoppers
movies.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

movies.title: The Bride!
movies.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

movies.title: Crime 101
movies.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

movies.title: "Wuthering Heights"
movies.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

movies.title: GOAT
movies.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

movies.title: Hamnet
movies.overview: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

movies.title: The Strangers: Chapter 3
movies.overview: Tethered by a frightening conclusion, Maya and the Strangers are locked on an unavoidable, unforgiving collision course — a showdown that proves they’re far from strangers now.

movies.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
movies.overview: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the streets of Lyari.

movies.title: The Secret Agent
movies.overview: Brazil, 1977. Marcelo, a technology expert in his early 40s, is on the run. Hoping to reunite with his son, he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting.

movies.title: Iron Lung
movies.overview: The stars are gone. The planets have disappeared. Only individuals aboard space stations or starships were left to give the end a name -- The Quiet Rapture. After decades of decay and crumbling infrastructure, the Consolidation of Iron has made a discovery on a barren moon designated AT-5. An ocean of blood. Hoping to discover desperately needed resources they immediately launch an expedition. A submarine is crafted and a convict is welded inside. Due to the pressure and depth of the ocean the forward viewport has been encased in metal. If successful, they will earn their freedom. If not, another will follow. This will be the 13th expedition.

movies.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe
movies.overview: Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.

movies.title: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
movies.overview: Long-lost footage from Elvis Presely's legendary Las Vegas residency in the 1970s woven together with rare 16mm footage from Elvis on Tour, and 8mm from the Graceland archive, plus recordings of Elvis telling "his side of the story" rediscovered during Baz Luhrmann's research for his 2022 film, Elvis.

movies.title: Scarlet
movies.originalTitle: 果てしなきスカーレット
movies.overview: After failing to avenge her father's murder, Princess Scarlet, wakes up in the "Land of the Dead." In this world filled with madness, if she does not achieve her revenge against her nemesis and reach the "No End Place," she will become "Void" and cease to exist. Can Scarlet find a way to live at the end of her endless journey?

movies.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh
movies.overview: A tribal boy is shaped by the values of his teacher, who gives him the name "Bhagat Singh".He grows up deeply rooted in strong morals, which guide his actions throughout his life.He stands firm against injustice and takes on powerful evil forces, even when facing overwhelming odds.

movies.title: Biker
movies.overview: An adrenaline-fueled motocross racing drama that follows competitors as they navigate dangerous competitions and face intense challenges on their bikes.

movies.title: With Love
movies.overview: Sathya reluctantly agrees to a blind date arranged by his sister and meets Monisha. They discover they attended the same school years ago. Bonding over shared memories and old crushes, they reconnect with their past and grow closer.

movies.title: Aashaan
movies.overview: Aashaan dreams of cinema until a 150-member film crew enters his life, bringing movie magic within reach. Chasing his big break, he confronts the industry's harsh realities.

movies.title: Kadhal Reset Repeat
movies.overview: Two people attempt to restart their romance after a major breakdown, believing that a “reset” will fix what went wrong. Just as hopeful habits begin, the shoals of memory, regret and new expectations force them to search for what they really want. A loop of love, loss and renewal takes them through familiar terrain with unfamiliar stakes.

movies.title: Dark Chocolate
movies.overview: After a string of failures, former star Yagna faces mockery from rival Dinesh through PR and fake accounts. Banned from Film Chamber for his attitude, can the "one-hit wonder" make a comeback?

movies.title: Kaa - The Forest
movies.overview: When a Cold Blooded Murderer Victor Mahadev’s (Salim Ghouse) Killing Freak Gangs Chasing After Two Boys Into Deep Forests. A Wild Life Photographer Venba Subbaiya (Andrea Jeremiah) Got Into Their Game of Death by Accident. Who is Going to See the Next Dawn is the Unfolding Story. Whether Venba or Victor, Because Survival Really Matters in Deep Forest.

movies.title: Youth
movies.overview: Youth follows Praveen, a 15-year-old boy who enters adolescence determined to find true love before school ends. As he goes through multiple relationships and heartbreaks, he slowly begins to understand what love truly means. Along the way, the experiences shape his growth, maturity, and outlook on life.

movies.title: Vaazha II: Biopic of a Billion Bros
Drishyam 3
movies.overview: Georgekutty is not just protecting his family from the world, he is protecting them from the truth, and from the burden of what binds them together. Now, as new forces begin to close in, more organized and determined than ever before, the cracks in his carefully built calm start to widen. The threat is no longer just external; it presses against his conscience, his relationships, and the fragile normalcy he has tried so hard to create. And as the walls slowly tighten around him and his family, how much more is Georgekutty willing to sacrifice.

movies.title: Aadu 3
movies.overview: Shaji Pappan and Co. opens a Pandora's box of reincarnations and multiple timelines leading to comic chaos of epic proportions.

movies.title: Carmeni Selvam
movies.overview: A content man's life turns chaotic when money fever strikes. His newfound greed leads to a series of amusing situations that unfold in this humorous tale.

movies.title: Rosie: The Saffron Chapter
movies.overview: Upcoming Hindi movie

movies.title: Prathichaya
movies.overview: After Kerala’s Chief Minister dies in a scandal engineered by a ruthless media tycoon, his son a brilliant tech entrepreneur enters the blood-soaked arena of politics to expose the conspiracy, vindicate his father, and turn technology against those who weaponized it
